overall.description: A first-person walk through a snowy night scene approaching a massive gothic manor. The camera moves through a stone archway, across a snow-covered courtyard with a central fountain, passes two figures in period clothing, and enters a grand marble hall. Cinematic game engine footage with atmospheric fog and dramatic lighting.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens from within a stone archway looking out at a massive gothic manor. The camera walks forward, exiting the archway into an open snowy courtyard. Stone gargoyle statues and ornate street lamps line the snow-covered path.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered approach to manor with central fountain

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snow-covered path toward the manor entrance

entered.detail: multi-tiered stone fountain in the courtyard center

segments.scene_description: Moving across the open snowy courtyard, the camera approaches a central fountain. The gothic manor looms larger ahead, with its illuminated windows glowing against the night sky. The path is lined with snow-covered hedges and ornate lamps.

events.description: camera begins turning right to circle around the fountain area

agents.ego_description: circling around the central fountain, viewing the manor from different angles

entered.detail: snow-covered stone benches flanking the path

segments.scene_description: The camera circles around the central fountain, revealing the manor's facade from a side angle. Snow-covered benches and hedges line the courtyard. The fountain becomes prominent in the foreground as the camera moves around it.

scene_state.functional_zone: manor entrance approach with two figures

events.description: two figures in long coats appear standing near the manor entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the main entrance, passing two figures standing near the doorway

notable_agents.action: two figures in period clothing standing and conversing near the entrance

entered.detail: grand wooden entrance door with stone archway
large stone planters with snow-covered shrubs

segments.scene_description: Approaching the manor's main entrance, two figures in period clothing stand near the doorway. The camera moves past them toward the large wooden doors. Stone planters and wall sconces frame the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with dual staircases

events.description: large wooden doors open, transitioning from outdoor courtyard to indoor grand hall
lighting shifts from cool blue night to warm golden interior illumination

agents.ego_description: walking through the entrance doors into the grand hall

entered.detail: massive carved wooden doors that swing open
vast interior hall with high ceilings and marble floors
curved marble staircase with ornate railings
elegant wall-mounted lights illuminating the hall

segments.scene_description: The large wooden doors swing open to reveal a magnificent grand entrance hall. The camera enters the warm, artificially lit interior with polished marble floors and dual curved staircases. The transition from cold blue night to warm golden interior is dramatic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a cold, snowy exterior courtyard into the opulent warmth of a gothic manor's grand hall. It begins by exiting a stone archway into an open courtyard, moving past gargoyle statues and ornate street lamps that line a snow-covered path. As the camera advances, it circles a central fountain while the manor looms larger ahead, its illuminated windows glowing against the dark night sky. The movement then carries the viewer past two figures in period clothing standing near the entrance, framed by stone planters and wall sconces. Finally, the large wooden doors swing open, shifting the atmosphere from the chilly blue night to a warm golden interior featuring polished marble floors and dual curved staircases.
